direction.audience_fit: Builders and reviewers who need confidence, clarity, and enough polish to share the result.

typography.heading: Aptos Display, Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
typography.body: Aptos, Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
typography.mono: SF Mono, Cascadia Code, Consolas, monospace

patterns.title_slide: Large editorial title with a warm accent and short subtitle.
patterns.section_slide: Sparse divider with one short support line.
patterns.comparison_slide: Two balanced panels with labeled contrast.
patterns.table_slide: Light rows, short cells, no dense spreadsheets.
patterns.code_slide: Readable mono block with a practical command.
patterns.architecture_slide: Simple left-to-right flow with few nodes.

decisions.decision: Use a warm editorial light direction for the demo deck.
decisions.rationale: The deck should feel more polished than a fixture while staying serious and readable.
